feature: Unified Agent Identity — Single Registry, Reliable Resolution (ADR-058)
description: CRITICAL BLOCKER: All swarm task mutations (create, assign, complete) fail with 403 when the agent identity chain is broken. This blocks ALL swarm-based development including workplan execution, multi-agent coordination, and task tracking. Must be completed before any other feature work proceeds.
blocks: hex agent list / hex swarm status accuracy

phases.name: Unified Agent Table in hexflo-coordination
phases.description: Create the hex_agent table in the hexflo-coordination WASM module that replaces both the in-memory AgentManager and the separate agent-registry module. This is the single source of truth for all agent identity.

tasks.name: Add hex_agent table and reducers to hexflo-coordination
tasks.description: In spacetime-modules/hexflo-coordination/src/lib.rs, add a new hex_agent table with fields: id, name, host, project_id, project_dir, model, session_id, status, swarm_id, role, worktree_path, registered_at, last_heartbeat, capabilities_json. Add reducers: agent_connect (upsert by session_id — if same session re-registers, update don't duplicate), agent_disconnect (set status=completed), agent_heartbeat_update (set last_heartbeat + status=online), agent_evict_stale (delete agents where status=dead and last_heartbeat > 1hr ago), agent_assign_swarm (set swarm_id + role). The existing swarm_agent table stays for backward compat but hex_agent is the new authority.

tasks.name: Publish updated hexflo-coordination module to SpacetimeDB
tasks.description: Build the WASM module and publish to the local SpacetimeDB instance. Verify the new table exists: spacetime sql hexflo-coordination 'SELECT * FROM hex_agent'. The publish must preserve existing swarm/task data.

phases.name: Registration and Resolution Chain
phases.description: Wire the session-start hook and NexusClient to use the new hex_agent table. The registration flow becomes: SessionStart → reducer call → hex_agent row created → session file written. Resolution: session file → agent_id → header.

tasks.name: Add hex_agent REST endpoints to hex-nexus
tasks.description: Create new route group in hex-nexus/src/routes/ for the unified agent API: (1) POST /api/hex-agents/connect — calls agent_connect reducer, returns agent ID + writes session file. (2) GET /api/hex-agents — queries hex_agent table, returns all agents with name/status/swarm/heartbeat. (3) DELETE /api/hex-agents/:id — calls agent_disconnect reducer. (4) POST /api/hex-agents/:id/heartbeat — calls agent_heartbeat_update reducer. (5) POST /api/hex-agents/evict — calls agent_evict_stale reducer. Add corresponding methods to IStatePort trait and SpacetimeDB adapter.

tasks.name: Update hex hook session-start to use new registration
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/hook.rs, update register_session_agent() to POST to /api/hex-agents/connect instead of /api/agents/connect. The response should include the full agent record (id, name, status). Update the SessionState struct to include all fields from hex_agent. Also add eviction: on session-start, call POST /api/hex-agents/evict to clean up dead agents.

tasks.name: Update hex agent list CLI to use new endpoint
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/agent.rs, update list_from_nexus() to GET /api/hex-agents instead of /api/agents. The new endpoint returns agents with name, status, swarm_id, last_heartbeat — no more '?' names. Keep the cross-reference with swarm tasks for the TASKS column. Update agent info and agent status commands similarly.

phases.name: Heartbeat and Eviction
phases.description: Add periodic heartbeat so agent status is live, and stale agents get cleaned up automatically.

tasks.name: Add heartbeat hook for PostToolUse
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/hook.rs, add a post_tool_heartbeat() function that sends a heartbeat to /api/hex-agents/:id/heartbeat. Wire it as a PostToolUse hook handler. The heartbeat should be throttled — only send if last_heartbeat is older than 30 seconds (check session file timestamp). This keeps the agent status=online as long as the session is active. Add the PostToolUse hook entry to .claude/settings.json if not already present.

tasks.name: Add eviction to hex nexus start
tasks.description: When hex-nexus starts, call agent_evict_stale reducer to clean up dead agents from previous sessions. Add a periodic timer (every 5 minutes) in hex-nexus that marks agents as stale (no heartbeat for 2 min) and dead (no heartbeat for 10 min). This ensures the agent list stays clean even if session-end hooks don't fire.

phases.name: Verify End-to-End and Deprecate Old Systems
phases.description: Smoke test the full chain: session-start registers agent → hex agent list shows name → swarm task complete works → hex swarm status shows agent on tasks. Then deprecate the old systems.

tasks.name: End-to-end smoke test
tasks.description: Rebuild all binaries. Restart nexus. Verify: (1) hex agent list shows current agent with name and status=online. (2) hex swarm init test-e2e creates swarm. (3) hex task create <swarm-id> 'test task' creates task. (4) hex task complete <task-id> 'done' succeeds (no 403). (5) hex swarm list shows 1/1 done. (6) hex swarm status shows agent name on task. (7) hex agent list shows agent with swarm cross-reference. Report any failures.

tasks.name: Mark old agent systems as deprecated
tasks.description: Add DEPRECATED comments to: (1) hex-nexus/src/orchestration/agent_manager.rs — replaced by hex_agent table. (2) hex-nexus/src/routes/orchestration.rs list_agents/get_agent — replaced by /api/hex-agents. (3) spacetime-modules/agent-registry/ — to be merged into hexflo-coordination in future. Do NOT delete yet — the dashboard may still reference these. Add a TODO linking to ADR-058 P5 for full removal.
